deploy.startCommand: python manage.py migrate && python manage.py collectstatic --noinput && python -c "import django; django.setup(); from django.contrib.auth import get_user_model; User = get_user_model(); User.objects.filter(email='admin@admin.com').exists() or User.objects.create_superuser('admin@admin.com', 'admin123')" && gunicorn config.wsgi:application --bind 0.0.0.0:8000 --workers 1 --timeout 120
